message:
feat(main,tools,tui): add am invocation detection, pane identity tools, and fix search detail scroll

**Binary Invocation Detection (main.rs, +67 lines)**
- Added invocation_is_am() to detect when the mcp-agent-mail binary is
  invoked as "am" (via symlink or PATH), automatically routing to the CLI
  surface instead of MCP mode
- Guards against packaging regressions where "am" points at the wrong binary
- Explicit AM_INTERFACE_MODE=mcp still overrides for advanced users
- Helper functions: invocation_file_name() extracts basename from argv[0],
  interface_mode_env_is_explicit() checks for non-empty env override
- Tests covering path variants, .exe suffix, and env detection edge cases

**Tool Cluster Map (lib.rs, +10 lines)**
- Registered resolve_pane_identity and cleanup_pane_identities in the
  TOOL_CLUSTER_MAP under the IDENTITY cluster
- Added corresponding unit tests verifying cluster membership

**Search Cockpit — Detail scroll fix (search.rs)**
- Added last_detail_max_scroll Cell<usize> field to track the maximum scroll
  position computed during the last render pass
- scroll_detail_by() now uses the cached max instead of recomputing
  detail_max_scroll() on every scroll event, preventing scroll jitter when
  content height changes between renders
- render_detail() now receives and updates the max_scroll_cell parameter
  for consistent scroll bound tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
